sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root כּוּן to stand)-

(1) a place, (Arab. مَكَانُ) Ezr 2:68 especially used of the place (i.e. the habitation, the dwelling) of God (Ethiopic መካነ፡ the dwelling of God, a temple), Exo 15:17 1Ki 8:13, 39 1Ki 8:39, 43 1Ki 8:43 Psa 33:14 2Ch 6:33, 39 2Ch 6:39.

(2) foundation, basis, Psa 89:15 97:2 . Plur. Psa 104:5.
